info.name: Amadeus Return the Delay Segment Where the Flight is Likely to Lay.

params.name: originLocationCode
params.description: city/airport [IATA code](http://www.iata.org/publications/Pages/code-search.aspx) from which the traveler is departing, e.g. PAR for Paris

params.name: destinationLocationCode
params.description: city/airport [IATA code](http://www.iata.org/publications/Pages/code-search.aspx) to which the traveler is going, e.g. PAR for Paris

params.name: departureDate
params.description: the date on which the traveler will depart from the origin to go to the destination. Dates are specified in the [ISO 8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601) YYYY-MM-DD format, e.g. 2019-12-25

params.name: departureTime
params.description: local time relative to originLocationCode on which the traveler will depart from the origin. Time respects ISO 8601 standard. e.g. 13:22:00

params.name: arrivalDate
params.description: the date on which the traveler will arrive to the destination from the origin. Dates are specified in the [ISO 8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601) YYYY-MM-DD format, e.g. 2019-12-25

params.name: arrivalTime
params.description: local time relative to destinationLocationCode on which the traveler will arrive to destination. Time respects ISO 8601 standard. e.g. 13:22:00

params.name: flightNumber
params.description: flight number as assigned by the carrier

params.name: duration
params.description: flight duration in [ISO8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601) PnYnMnDTnHnMnS format, e.g. PT2H10M

items.docs: Amadeus Return the Delay Segment Where the Flight is Likely to Lay.
